title: CLI scaffold with cobra
description: Set up cobra CLI framework with root command and subcommands: run, register, claim, lease, release, heartbeat, complete. Parse env vars: AGENT_NAME, AGENT_COMMAND, AGENT_MAIL_URL, BEADS_DB, TASK_FILTER, HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL, IDLE_SLEEP. No implementation yet, just command structure.

title: claim command - pick highest priority ready task
description: bosun claim queries beads for the next task to work on. Runs: br ready --json, filters by TASK_FILTER if set, picks the first (highest priority unblocked) task. Outputs the task ID to stdout. If no tasks available, exits with code 0 and empty stdout. Updates task status to in_progress via br update.

title: run command - full lifecycle loop
description: bosun run implements the main agent loop: register -> claim -> lease -> run AGENT_COMMAND -> complete/release -> reset -> repeat. Traps SIGTERM for graceful shutdown (release leases, update task status). Spawns background heartbeat goroutine. Sleeps IDLE_SLEEP seconds when no tasks available. Logs each lifecycle phase.

title: Graceful shutdown and signal handling
description: Handle SIGTERM/SIGINT in the run loop. On signal: stop the agent command (SIGTERM to child process group), release any active file lease, update current task back to open status in beads, send final heartbeat with shutdown state, exit cleanly. Use context.WithCancel for goroutine coordination.

title: complete command - close task and create PR
description: bosun complete <task-id> handles post-task cleanup. Closes the beads issue: br close <task-id>. Creates PR if hoist is available: hoist pr agent/AGENT_NAME --title <task-title>. Releases file lease. Resets worktree: hoist reset agent/AGENT_NAME. Each step is best-effort -- failure in one doesn't block others.

title: register command - announce agent identity
description: bosun register announces the agent to agent-mail. Posts agent identity (AGENT_NAME, hostname, PID, start time) to AGENT_MAIL_URL. If agent-mail is not configured/reachable, log warning and continue (not fatal). Store registration state in /tmp/bosun-{name}.json for other commands to reference.

title: heartbeat command - periodic liveness ping
description: bosun heartbeat sends a status update to agent-mail. Reports: agent name, current task (if any), uptime, idle/working state. Designed to be called periodically from the run loop. No-op if agent-mail is not configured.

title: lease and release commands - file lease management
description: bosun lease <task-id> acquires an advisory file lease via agent-mail API. Reads the task description from beads to determine relevant file paths (or accepts --paths flag). Posts lease request to AGENT_MAIL_URL. bosun release <task-id> releases the lease. Both are no-ops if agent-mail is not configured.
